title: Pedestal - Box/Box/File (With or without wheels)
brand_hint: Brand unknown — search title to identify manufacturer

specs.dimensions: MVLW23BBF (fixed): 15"W x 23"D x 27.62"H; MVLM23BBF (mobile): 15"W x 23"D x 27.87"H
specs.weight: MVLW23BBF: 84 lbs / 38.1 kg; MVLM23BBF: 75 lbs / 34 kg
specs.materials: Steel / metal construction with electrostatically applied recyclable paint finish
key_features: Recessed angled full pull drawer fronts
Key lock (one key locks all drawers)
Drawers support front-to-back filing; conversion bars included for side-to-side filing
Fixed (MVLW23BBF) version pre-drilled to fasten to worksurface, with levelling glides
specs.notes: BBI product URL slug identifies this as the Offices to Go MVLPED series Box/Box/File pedestal, offered in both fixed/under-desk (MVLW23BBF) and mobile/wheeled (MVLM23BBF) variants — matching the 'with or without wheels' title. Nevada appears in BBI's slug as a finish option. Grand & Toy lists a slightly different depth (22.62") for the mobile version; manufacturer spec of 23"D is authoritative.
